subject: FW: Leah antiques
body:
Please advise

 

Rich Kahn

457 Madison Avenue

4th Floor

New York, NY 10022

tel  212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

 

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Thursday, November 15, 2007 5:15 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: RE: Leah antiques

 

Rich,

>From memory, there is a wood statue of a horse, a pair of glass table
lamps and a large pencil sketch from Leah.  Also in this storage unit
(Brandon) but from other vendors is a red lacquer desk and (3) painted
mirrors.  (This is again from memory.)  I have contacted the storage
facility and requested they send us a full inventory of what is there in
case there is something that others with access have added.  I have
located images of everything I've mentioned except the pair of table
lamps but I want my list to be complete and accurate before sending.
Thank-you for your patience.

Daniel

 

From: Rich Kahn [mailto:rkahn@nysgmail.com] 
Sent: Thursday, November 15, 2007 5:09 PM
To: Daniel Estes
Subject: RE: Leah antiques

 

Thanks for the update

Mr. Epstein keeps asking for these details 

When can I expect the list?

 

Sorry to be so pushy

Thank you

 

Rich Kahn

457 Madison Avenue

4th Floor

New York, NY 10022

tel  212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

 

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, November 14, 2007 5:37 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net; Rich Kahn
Subject: Leah antiques

 

I am compiling a list of the items from Leah as well as the other items
that are in the storage unit in Palm Beach and will forward it to you.
Mark Zeff is with Jeffrey right now and has relayed that to him as well.

 

Daniel Estes

destes@zeffdesign.com

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x206

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com

Please advise

 

Rich Kahn

457 Madison Avenue

4th Floor

New York, NY 10022

tel  212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

 

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com]
Sent: Thursday, November 15, 2007 5:15 PM
To: Rich Kahn
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: RE: Leah antiques

 

Rich,

From memory, there is a wood statue of a horse, a pair of glass table lamps and a large pencil sketch from Leah.  Also in this storage unit (Brandon) but from other vendors is a red lacquer desk and (3) painted mirrors.  (This is again from memory.)  I have contacted the storage facility and requested they send us a full inventory of what is there in case there is something that others with access have added.  I have located images of everything I’ve mentioned except the pair of table lamps but I want my list to be complete and accurate before sending.  Thank-you for your patience.

Daniel
